title: helianthemum alpestre var. rotundifolium
intro: Helianthemum alpestre var. rotundifolium, also known as Rockrose, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, characterized by its small, pink or white flowers and rounded leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, derived from its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Helianthemum alpestre var. rotundifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a promising treatment for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and respiratory problems.
